_comment: Externalized R5 rate-loader configuration. Business/actuarial maintained. Copy to rate_loader_config.json and complete before emit.

iswl_phase1._note: Validation-only; does not filter global rate emit.

iswl_phase2._note: ISWL QUIKGPS — PAAGERAT TYPE=BP, VARGP=3 attained-age scalar.

iswl_phase3._note: ISWL QUIKCOI — PAAGERAT TYPE=U6, VARGP=3 attained-age scalar.

iswl_phase4._note: ISWL QUIKGCOI — PAAGERAT TYPE=U5, VARGP=3 attained-age scalar.

iswl_phase5._note: ISWL QUIKUINT — PDINT CENII/A1 union_merge historical tiers → QuikUint.

iswl_phase6._note: ISWL QUIKISSC — Rate_Table TYPE=SL hub schedule → QuikIssc (8 rows).

_paagerat_note: PAAGERAT PR: VARGP=3 attained-age grid. SEQ->QuikGps.AGE, CNTL=00/GP0. Join: PAAGERAT -> PCOVRSGT -> PCOVR -> crosswalk PLAN.

segmentation_defaults._note: Authoritative single rate generation EFFDATE=19000101 (no effective-date variants). EFFDATE != 19000101 is a BLOCKER.

_assumption_note: Actuarial assumption fields (MORT/RSVINT/RSVMETH/INTMETHCV/INTMETHTV/ETIMORT/NFOINT/STOREMEANS/CALCMIDS) are deferred. Blank values remain blank placeholders; they are NOT invented.
